inputs.label: Solar Masses
inputs.businessContext: The mass in solar masses to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: The mass in solar masses to convert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse en masses solaires à convertir.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa en masas solares a convertir.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: The number of kilograms in one solar mass (default is 1.989 × 10³⁰ kg).

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of kilograms in one solar mass (default is 1.989 × 10³⁰ kg).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir güneş kütlesindeki kilogram sayısı (varsayılan 1.989 × 10³⁰ kg).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Kilogramm in einer Sonnenmasse (Standard: 1,989 × 10³⁰ kg).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de kilogrammes dans une masse solaire (par défaut 1,989 × 10³⁰ kg).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de kilogramos en una masa solar (por defecto 1.989 × 10³⁰ kg).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الكيلوجرامات في كتلة شمسية واحدة (الافتراضي هو 1.989 × 10³⁰ كجم).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para la salida.

inputs.label: Uncertainty (±%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage uncertainty for the conversion, used to compute lower and upper bounds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage uncertainty for the conversion, used to compute lower and upper bounds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm için yüzde belirsizlik, alt ve üst sınırları hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentuale Unsicherheit für die Umrechnung, zur Berechnung von Unter- und Obergrenzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'incertitude pour la conversion, utilisé pour calculer les bornes inférieure et supérieure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de incertidumbre para la conversión, utilizado para calcular los límites inferior y superior.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة عدم اليقين للتحويل، تستخدم لحساب الحدود الدنيا والعليا.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
